title: Nutty Fluffy Squash Stir-fry
description: A delightful date-night Moroccan-inspired dish featuring squash, fermented foods, and a hint of nuttiness for a paleo-friendly meal.
instructions: Chop butternut squash into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
Dice onion and finely chop garlic.
In a pan, heat coconut oil over medium heat. Add onion and cook until translucent.
Add garlic, stir for about 1 minute, then add chopped squash. Cook until tender.
Blend together almond flour with water to form a paste (about 2 tablespoons of water per tablespoon of flour).
Stir in the blended paste, fermented foods, nutritional yeast (if using), and fresh parsley. Mix well.
Transfer mixture into an oven-safe dish. Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Serve hot as a side dish or with paleo-friendly grains like cauliflower rice.
